questionHtml: Deduce the structural formula of the repeating unit of the polymer formed from this alkene.
markschemeHtml:
Do not penalize missing brackets or n.

Do not award mark if continuation bonds are not shown.

meta.title: Deduce the structural formula of the repeating unit of the polymer formed from this alkene.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.4.5—Addition polymers form by the breaking of a double bond in each monomer. Represent the repeating unit of an addition polymer from given monomer structures.
